title: serviceSLAstandardalertrule
content:
# serviceSLAstandard ## payment-service
- SLA：99.5%
- P99responsetime：<= 3seconds
- QPScapacity：1500
- alertrule：error>0.5%duration5minutes，P99>3sduration10minutes ## order-service
- SLA：99.9%
- P99responsetime：<= 1seconds
- QPScapacity：1000
- threshold： < 50records
- alertrule：error>0.5%duration3minutes，>100records/hours ## notification-service
- latencySLA：lag < 5000records
- ：500records/seconds
- alertrule：lag>10000duration10minutes ## gateway-service
- TLSlatency：<= 20ms
- connectioncapacity：20000
- TLScache：>= 80%
- alertrule：latency>50msduration5minutes
author: SRE Team
